title: Achievements 260+
description: 260 + New Achievements For You! Collect Them all
body:
View the whole bio on CurseForge:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/achievements-mod-200

**Anvilcore is no longer required and can be deleted!**

![Achievements.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79b4cedfda248ed14a69ea72a9c824c852177ef9.webp)

The title speaks for itself. This mod adds 240 new Minecraft achievements to your Minecraft server.

![Bug report.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86cc577085cfa7ebb32116a5722b0b6f2c8c340b.webp)

Have you found a bug in one of our achievements? then be sure to let us know on the tab: Issues - github. that will certainly help us further.
